results.rendered_html: ūṣara (von ūṣa) adj. (f. ā) salzhaltig (vom Boden); subst. salziger Boden  P. 5,2,107 . gaṇa aśmādi zu 4,2,80 .  AK. 2,1,5 . 3,4,13,59 .  TRIK. 2,1,6 .  H. 939 . tasmātpaśavyamūṣaramityāhuḥ  ŚAT. BR. 2,1,1,6 . 13,8,1,14 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 21,3,16 . na coṣarāṃ na nirdagdhāṃ mahīṃ dadyātkadā ca na  MBH. 13,3341 . tatra vidyā na vaptavyā śubhaṃ vījamivoṣare  M. 2,112 .  R. 3,44,3 .  MBH. 13,4314 . sukṛṣṭādūṣarādiva  PAÑCAT. I, 53 . anūṣara  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 2,7 .  GṚHYASAṂGR. 1,38 . 2,34 .  SUŚR. 1,134,19  (f.).

results.rendered_html:
ūṣara a. [ūṣa-matvarthīyoraḥ] Impregnated with salt or saline particles.
— raḥ, -raṃ A barren spot with saline soil; na hi tasmātphalaṃ tasya sukṛṣṭādūṣarādiva  Pt. 1. 47 ;  Śi. 14. 46. 
Comp.
— jaṃ
1 salt produced from salt soil.
2 a kind of magnet.
